LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-3, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSALS AND ENTER JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS THE FOLLOWING TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 AND ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CONDITIONAL STIPULATED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2024 Off Calendar

Motion To Set Aside Dismissals And Enter Judgmnt
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-3, Motion To Set Aside Dismissals And Enter Judgment.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the following tentative ruling:

Plaintiff's NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-3 unopposed "motion to set aside dismissal pursuant to CCP 664.6 and enter judgment pursuant to conditional stipulated settlement agreement" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
